title: Teething Toys for Baby, Silicone Baby Rattle Teether Sensory Teeting Toys for Babies 0-6 6-12 Months, BPA-Free for New Baby Gifts
features: [ Safe and Gentle for Your Baby ] We prioritize your baby's safety with our teether. Made from baby-safe silicone and ABS plastic.It's a 100% safe rattle teether, free from BPA, PVC, lead, phthalates, and cadmium.The silicone is made of one-piece silicone and can prevent children from choking.The teethers are designed to soothe your baby's sore gums safely.Patent NO.6478550

[ 2 in 1 Rattle Teether Easy to Hold] The shape of the baby teething toy is perfectly sized for a baby's small grip, making it easy to hold and chew. When your baby shakes this teether, the beads in the rattle ring spin 360 degrees and make a fun sound. This two-in-one toy helps with their hand-eye coordination and hearing.

[ Fun Textures and Colors to Explore ]With 6 bright colors and 6 different textures, this toy is exciting to look at and touch. The textures massage sore gums, while the colors and surfaces encourage sensory play and discovery.By engaging with the different textures of the teether, your baby can massage their gums to support tooth eruption, exercise their tongue, and thereby boost their language development.

[ Simple to Keep Clean ]You can easily clean these teethers to keep them germ-free. -50° to 230°,They are dishwasher-safe and can be boiled or sterilized (Please remember to remove the plastic ring before boiling or sterilizing.). You can also chill them in the fridge for extra soothing relief.This guarantees excellent hygiene, which is essential for any baby teething toy.

[ The Perfect Gift for Any Baby ] The teether comes in a exquisite box with a bow and cute animals printed on it, making it the perfect gift for a newborn baby,baby showers, birthdays, Christmas, or any special occasion. It's a beloved toy for newborns and infants up to 36 months old.Perfect for babies from 0-3 3-6 6-12 12-24months.Two options are available. The geometric shape is the larger size: 12.2*12.2*2cm. The animal pattern is the smaller size: 10*10*1.4cm.
